title: Three Consecutive Odds
titleCn: 存在连续三个奇数的数组

testcases.input: arr = [2,6,4,1] Output: false Explanation: There are no three consecutive odds.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: There are no three consecutive odds.

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,34,3,4,5,7,23,12] Output: true Explanation: [5,7,23] are three consecutive odds.
